description:
Machine-readable CANONICAL-BYTE oracle for the offline-package v2 signature payload (handoff D2). Each vector is an input tuple -> expectedPayloadHex, where expectedPayloadHex is the lowercase, unspaced hex of UTF8(sigV2Tag + '
' + version + '
' + digest + '
' + minAppVersion + '
' + fileManifestHash + '
' + rollbackFloor) — the EXACT bytes BOTH PackageVerifier ends feed to Ed25519 BEFORE the signature step. It is signing-key-INDEPENDENT and fully deterministic, so it survives every re-mint of the throwaway test key and lets each end assert its payload builder byte-for-byte (empty-tail and populated shapes). Generated by scripts/gen-verify-extended-fixture.sh.

vectors.name: emptyTail
vectors.comment: EMPTY-TAIL primary shape (handoff D1): fileManifestHash='' and rollbackFloor='' — what the live app-manifest fetch signs. The payload ends with two trailing newlines (bytes ...0a0a).

vectors.name: populatedTail
vectors.comment: POPULATED shape: fileManifestHash and rollbackFloor both non-empty (the valid case's tuple).
